hero_title: Living with **histamine intolerance**? I didn't know what was wrong with me either, until recently.
hero_lead: I'm Cătălina. I have histamine intolerance, and I spent months trying to understand what was happening to my body. MyHistamate is where I put everything I've learned — not to lecture you, but because I wish it had existed when I started.
story_title: For almost a year I thought it was stress. That I ate badly. That I slept poorly.
story_p1: Itching with no explanation. Migraines that wouldn't ease for days. Fatigue that never lifted no matter how much I slept. And moments when I was both exhausted and wired at the same time — it has a name: *Wired and Tired*. And it's histamine in the brain, not anxiety.
story_p2: The histamine intolerance diagnosis came with relief and frustration at the same time. Relief that there was an explanation. Frustration that there's almost no practical tool to help you manage it in real life — at a restaurant, on holiday, on the bad hormonal days.
story_p3: That's how MyHistamate started. Not from a business idea, but from a real need I live every single day.
story_quote: I'm a person with HIT who learned a great deal from my own experience, and who wants to make the road easier for someone else.
finds_title: Everything I wish I'd found at the start, in one place.
finds_lead: Practical things I've tested myself that make a real difference in everyday life with HIT.
find_1_text: What you can order at a restaurant, what to cook quickly at home, how to travel without fearing the menu.
find_2_text: How to understand what's happening in your body, and why some days are harder than others.
find_3_text: Stress, sleep, the hormonal cycle, physical effort and how they connect to histamine.
find_4_text: Free downloadable guides and, soon, an app that does the work for you.
guide_1_text: How to read a menu, what questions to ask, what to order safely.
guide_2_text: What to do when you've just found out you have HIT. Step by step, no panic.
guide_3_text: The single most important concept, explained the way I wish someone had explained it to me.
nl_title: I write when I have something that actually helps.
nl_lead: No fixed schedule and no spam. You'll get an email when I publish a new article or discover something that truly helped me — plus app news, before everyone else.
app_lead: I already use, day to day, a method that helps me keep my histamine under control — and it genuinely works for me. Now I'm turning it into an app. I can't reveal everything yet, but it's something I wholeheartedly wish had existed from the start.
app_line: It's not ready yet. But if you'd like to be among the first to try it:
footer_tagline: About life with histamine intolerance — honest and practical.
